name: GoHighLevel
description: All-in-one marketing & CRM platform for agencies with a public REST API for integrations and Marketplace apps.

auth_methods.note: Docs explicitly describe Private Integration Token (used as a Bearer token) and OAuth 2.0 (authorization code & token exchange).

credential_access.note: The accessible primary source confirms auth mechanisms (Private Integration Token and OAuth 2.0) but does not state whether obtaining developer credentials requires a paid plan, a trial, or any billing. The previously referenced Help Center article for Marketplace app registration was not available to verify signup requirements.

api_surface.note: API v2 is documented as a RESTful API with many product areas covered (contacts, campaigns, appointments, etc.). Official OpenAPI sources are in the project's GitHub repo.

buildability.note: Buildable from public docs: the official API auth page documents how to call the API with a Private Integration Token (Bearer token) and how to use OAuth 2.0 (authorization URL and token URL). However, the exact credential provisioning/onboarding path (and whether any paid requirement exists) is not confirmed in the fetched primary sources.
